comment: Run-smoke lane quarantine-with-expiry registry (WI-2452). Each entry temporarily demotes ONE Playwright web-e2e smoke project (see tools/quarantine/run-smoke-lanes.cjs for the declared-core list) from the required-stable core lane to the non-gating advisory lane until `expires` (an ISO 8601 date, UTC). The demoted project keeps running in the advisory lane — this is NOT the same as tools/quarantine/quarantine.json, which skips a test file from the PR gate entirely. An expired entry is ignored and the project silently reverts to core: no permanent mutes. Every entry needs an id, project, owner, Cosmo WI-NN, reason, and expires. Quarantining any specific project is a PM-approved proposal (see docs/testing/run-smoke-gate-hygiene-runbook.md); this registry ships empty. Validate: node tools/quarantine/run-smoke-lanes.cjs validate.
